title: Process Engineer Vacancy at LG Electronics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at LG Electronics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LG Electronics India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About LG Electronics India:
LG Electronics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India!
